name: io.github.phenicea/agentdata-liquidity-exit-cost
title: AgentData - Executable Liquidity / Exit-Cost
description: Size-aware exit cost, depeg risk, and liquidity fragility for a token on Base. Deterministic on-chain AMM math (Aerodrome + Uniswap v3). Testnet / preview.
